case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. CLASSIC CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC., et al

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony of Plaintiff's witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Classic Construction Company, Inc. and David Jacobi as follows:
Principal $67,455.56
Prejudgment Interest $3,178.56
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $425.50, for a total of $73,559.62
Judgment signed in open court.
